name: Explo
description: Explo — Embeddable analytics and dashboarding platform for SaaS products with white-label customer-facing reporting.

seo.title: Explo — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Explo: Explo — Embeddable analytics and dashboarding platform for SaaS products with white-label customer-facing reporting.

when_to_use: Embedding white-label analytics dashboards in SaaS products
Customer-facing reporting for non-technical end users
No-code chart builder connected directly to warehouses
Self-serve BI layer added to existing SaaS applications
Replacing Metabase embed with white-label customer reports

pros: Customer-facing dashboards in days not months
SQL-first so no proprietary modeling layer
cons: Less flexible than fully custom charts
Performance depends on upstream warehouse tuning
review.verdict: Quick embedded analytics for SaaS, but serious analytics products still need custom builds.
review.best_for: SaaS teams shipping white-labeled customer dashboards quickly
review.not_for: Products requiring deeply bespoke interactive visualizations
